purpose: Canonical source of truth for the Alexanarch top-of-page navigation bar. Every renderer (wire_deposit.py, regenerate_surfaces.py, generate_observatory.py) reads this file. Authored static pages get synced via scripts/sync_navbars.py. To change the nav: edit this file, then run scripts/sync_navbars.py and regenerate_surfaces.py.

items.label: Alexanarch
items.description: Home — newest deposits, the corpus orientation

items.label: Browse
items.description: Full deposit index, sortable, all 884 entries

items.label: Observatory
items.description: Surface Weather Station — public-surface visibility measurements

items.label: Deposit
items.description: How to deposit — self-serve [DEPOSIT] issue path

items.label: Guide
items.description: Reading guide — entry points into the corpus

items.label: Manifest
items.description: Operating manifest — current state of the archive

render_specification.html_structure:
Single
...
element. Each item rendered as label separated by spaces. The renderer may mark the active item via class="active".
render_specification.fallback: If this file cannot be read, renderers should emit the minimal core nav: Alexanarch · Browse · Deposit · Guide · Manifest

consumed_by: scripts/render_navbar.py — helper called by all generators
scripts/sync_navbars.py — one-shot pass over authored static pages
